hook: Good flirting is responsive, not preloaded.
body: The best playful moments emerge from what is actually happening between you, not from lines imported from another context.

hook: Trying to run a canned flirtation script often makes you less observant right when observation matters most.
body: Let her actual personality and the live moment tell you what kind of play is welcome.

hook: Let her actual personality and the live moment tell you what kind of play is welcome.
body: A callback to something she just said usually feels sharper and more intimate than a generic flirt move.

hook: A callback to something she just said usually feels sharper and more intimate than a generic flirt move.
body: Use fewer memorized moves and more callbacks, contrasts, and reactions to what is in front of you.
